heading: Nonapplicability of administrative procedure provisions
label: 835 Nonapplicability of administrative procedure provisions
text: Subchapter II of chapter 5, and chapter 7, of title 5, shall not apply to the use or exercise of any authority granted by this subchapter.
notes: Codification“Subchapter II of chapter 5, and chapter 7, of title 5” substituted in text for “the Administrative Procedure Act, as amended” on authority of , , , the first section of which enacted Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.Pub. L. 89–554, § 7(b)80 Stat. 631Sept. 6, 1966
